heading: Today
text: A chance of localized rain or freezing rain in the morning, then some breaks of afternoon sun, with another chance of rain showers. Mild. Highs from the upper 40s to mid 50s. South wind at 10 to 15 mph, gusting 20 to 30 mph, with gusts up to 40 mph through the Champlain Valley and over the Greens.

heading: Tonight
text: A good chance of widespread rain showers. Lows in the 30s to low 40s. Winds turning to the southwest at 10 to 15 mph, gusting 20 to 30 mph then diminishing through the early morning.

heading: Sunday
text: Morning showers ending, then skies becoming increasingly sunny. Highs from the mid 40s to low 50s. West wind at 5 to 10 mph, with occasional gusts up to 15 mph.
